name: Jacquez Rosenberg
description:
A necromancer looking for meaning in his life.

___________________________

“My sister might have died on that day but I’ll see to it her legacy isn’t forgotten. They will remember her name.”

___________________________

Jace is a D&D character I've used several times and the most recent campaign I was in with him made me sad about everything we put him though, so I made an update to the bot I had made a while back to try and see what it would take to make this man happy. :'^)

He's a bit snobbish and kinda a jerk, but I have it in the senerio that you remind him of his sister so hopefully he won't be too much of an ass. He's also , but I dunno if the bot will stay in line with that especially when Jace would probably melt if anyone is actually nice to him.

Jace and his sister Gwenivere if anyone is curious:
